title: stachys mialhesii
intro: Stachys mialhesii, also known as Spiked Betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's leaves, flowers, and stems possess medicinal properties due to their high concentration of rosmarinic acid and other bioactive compounds. Stachys mialhesii has been traditionally used to alleviate various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, thanks to its calming, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine for promoting relaxation and overall well-being.
